hero.tagline: Fullstack Developer focused on building modern SaaS, fluid interfaces and clean code.

barber.description:
💈 Problem: small and medium barbershops struggle to organize schedules, avoid booking conflicts, and keep customer history.

✅ Solution: platform that centralizes
• real-time scheduling
• customer records
• service history
• business operations control
• conversation and support management via Chatwoot
• AI to understand customer messages and support the service flow

🧰 Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Tailwind.
⚙️ Technical highlights: architecture ready for multiple establishments, performance-oriented data design, and clear frontend/backend separation.

habit.description:
🧠 Intelligent app that combines habit tracking with AI, helping users identify patterns and improve consistency over time.

🧩 Problem: traditional habit apps do not offer personalized follow-up, making it harder to identify behavior patterns and sustain consistency.

💡 Solution: app that integrates habit tracking with an AI assistant, enabling:
• continuous habit tracking
• user behavior analysis
• personalized guidance generation
• context-based progress

⚙️ Technologies:
• React (frontend)
• Groq AI API
• MongoDB database
• backend for context and request management

🚀 Technical highlights:
• persistence of habit and interaction history
• AI integration for real-time responses
• prompt structure for personalized coaching
• per-user context management
• foundation for continuous behavioral analysis

📈 Impact:
• personalized guidance for each user
• better consistency in habit tracking
• continuous evolution based on data

market.description:
📊 Real-time financial analytics platform built to deliver a modern and high-performance experience for asset visualization and management.

🧩 Problem: investors need to track multiple assets in real time, but existing tools are often slow, complex, or fragmented.

💡 Solution: financial dashboard that centralizes market data in a fast and intuitive interface, enabling:
• real-time portfolio tracking
• profit and loss (P&L) visualization
• analysis of assets such as crypto, currencies, and commodities

⚙️ Technologies:
• React 18 (Hooks + Context API)
• WebSocket (real-time data integration)
• Chart.js (data visualization)
• Vite (build and performance)
• PWA (Progressive Web App)

🚀 Technical highlights:
• real-time updates through WebSocket
• multi-context architecture for state management
• performance optimizations (lazy loading, memoization)
• PDF and CSV report export
• multi-language and multi-currency support
• resilient structure with error handling

📈 Impact:
• faster data-driven decision making
• centralized financial information in one interface
• smooth experience even with real-time updates

km.description:
🚚 Financial management platform for independent truck drivers, enabling freight profitability calculations and real-time financial health tracking.

🧩 Problem: cargo drivers often rely on manual calculations or complex spreadsheets to understand trip profitability, which hurts decision making and financial control.

💡 Solution: app that automates profitability calculation, enabling:
• instant net profit calculation per freight
• profit margin percentage visualization
• financial flow organization by period
• operation performance analysis

⚙️ Technologies:
• Next.js (App Router)
• TypeScript
• Tailwind CSS
• Supabase (database and authentication)
• jsPDF (report generation)

🚀 Technical highlights:
• secure authentication via Magic Link
• real-time data persistence with integrated backend
• structure designed for scalability and continuous usage
• professional PDF and CSV report generation
• interface optimized for quick usage in real-world conditions

📈 Impact:
• replaces spreadsheets and manual calculations
• enables faster and more assertive decisions
• helps drivers identify more profitable routes
• improves financial control of operations

about.title: About
about.bio1: Fullstack Developer focused on product building, automation, and AI integrations, using technologies such as
about.bio6: , a mobile marketplace startup that connects clients and service providers, where I led the complete product development with Flutter and Laravel backend, including store publishing on
about.bio8: , and the project became a semifinalist in Globo's Rocket reality show, with episode available on Globoplay and official media coverage validating its innovation and market impact.
about.bio9: Hands-on experience building full applications, from backend to mobile
about.bio10: , including third-party API integrations and business logic focus. I have also built decision-support systems, such as freight feasibility calculation and AI automations for WhatsApp support workflows. I worked in an international remote environment using Node.js, delivering solutions for operational optimization and collaborating daily in English. I hold a C2 proficiency certification from the University of Cambridge. I always focus on deeply understanding the problem before building the solution, prioritizing efficiency, simplicity, and real impact.

about.fullstackDesc: Building scalable and secure architectures, integrating modern databases with fluid interfaces and high performance.

startup.title: Autonomus
startup.startupSubtitle: Complete platform connecting clients and service providers, focused on security, efficiency, and scalability.
startup.problemDesc: Hiring independent services is still fragmented, unsafe, and inefficient. Clients struggle to find trusted professionals, while workers have low visibility and limited access to opportunities.
startup.solution1: direct connection between clients and service providers
startup.diff2: clear separation of responsibilities across applications
startup.impact4: creates a foundation for platform expansion
startup.educationImpactDesc: I worked as a robotics instructor at UTFPR, teaching programming logic and computational thinking to children from public schools. I planned and led hands-on activities with LEGO and Scratch focused on problem solving.
startup.educationImpact1: hands-on LEGO and Scratch classes for children
startup.educationImpact2: development of logical reasoning and computational thinking
startup.educationImpact3: methods focused on creativity and problem solving
startup.cacompSubtitle: Member of UTFPR's Computer Science Academic Center
startup.cacompDesc: I served as a member of UTFPR's Computer Science Academic Center (CACOMP), helping organize events, talks, and initiatives focused on the academic and professional development of Computer Science students.
startup.cacomp1: organization of events and talks for the academic community
startup.cacomp2: promotion of initiatives for students' professional development
startup.cacomp3: encouragement of hands-on learning and student networking
startup.cacomp4: strengthening student engagement in Computer Science
